title: Experimental workaround for cdn03.quay.io flake
body:
I can't find instances of the "lookup cdn03.quay.io" flake
in RHEL gating tests. RHEL does not use systemd-resolved.
Maybe pure coincidence. Maybe not.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body: Five (six?) runs, and no sign of the flake; but here's the flake, right now, in a different PR: https://cirrus-ci.com/task/5480576929497088

I lost count of the retries. None failed with the `cdn03` flake, despite other concurrent PRs  flaking that way.

@containers/podman-maintainers it makes me queasy to ask this, but please review and merge if you see fit. I'd like to reevaluate in a few weeks, see if the `cdn03` flake persists, and then figure out where to go from there.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago*, *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago,vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> LGTM
> 
> I added a reminder to my calendar.

Reminder kicked in.  @edsantiago, all good with this change?

Oh, interesting. Here's the `cdn03` flake list for the last 25 days:

* fedora-36-aarch64 : sys podman fedora-36-aarch64 root host
  * PR #17864
    * [03-21 05:49](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5165656102928384/html/sys-podman-fedora-36-aarch64-root-host.log.html)
* fedora-37-aarch64 : Build for fedora-37-aarch64
  * PR #17963
    * [03-28 09:56](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6132890992377856/logs/prebuild.log)
  * PR #17951
    * [03-27 17:21](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/4739566255472640/logs/prebuild.log)
* fedora-37-aarch64 : machine podman fedora-37-aarch64 rootless host
  * PR #17875
    * [03-21 11:31](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6340341503098880/logs/main.log)
  * PR #17873
    * [03-21 10:26](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/6750384111222784/logs/main.log)
  * PR #17810
    * [03-16 07:13](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/task/5197685636988928/logs/main.log)
* fedora-37-aarch64 : sys podman fedora-37-aarch64 root host
  * PR #17925
    * [03-25 07:47](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/4613156778016768/html/sys-podman-fedora-37-aarch64-root-host.log.html)
  * PR #17873
    * [03-21 13:57](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6543844066459648/html/sys-podman-fedora-37-aarch64-root-host.log.html)
    * [03-21 10:55](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5074728390492160/html/sys-podman-fedora-37-aarch64-root-host.log.html)
  * PR #17862
    * [03-21 06:20](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6001330909609984/html/sys-podman-fedora-37-aarch64-root-host.log.html)
    * [03-21 05:44](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6668424491827200/html/sys-podman-fedora-37-aarch64-root-host.log.html)
  * PR #17809
    * [03-16 07:41](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/5265544593539072/html/sys-podman-fedora-37-aarch64-root-host.log.html)

...and of those, some are in "Build" step (which ISTR happens before my disable-systemd code?) and the rest are in `v4.4` branches. I would say this has been a success. Now what???

> Now what???

Can we disable it when building the VM images?
Probably worth reporting the bug as well.

@cevich: only [containers](https://github.com/orgs/containers/people) org members may request cherry picks. You can still do the cherry-pick manually.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/17505#issuecomment-1492505881):

>/cherrypick v4.4
